## What would you like to be able to do?

<!-- Describe the feature clearly. What should it do? -->

## Why would this be useful?

<!-- Who would benefit from this? Is this something you think others would want too, or is it specific to your setup? -->

## Have you thought about how it might work?

<!-- Optional. If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here. Don't worry if you don't - that's fine too. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Optional. Is there a workaround you're currently using? Is there a different way this could be solved? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, examples from other projects, or anything else that helps explain the idea. -->
